scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k -n WEB,DESKTOP -c cyan,green "npm run dev:desktop:web" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:19006 && electron desktop/main.js"
scripts.dev:full:web: concurrently -k -n API,WEB -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:full:desktop: concurrently -k -n API,WEB,DESKTOP -c magenta,cyan,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:desktop:web" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:19006 && electron desktop/main.js"
